message:
fix(session): populate model provider and id in extension session state

ExtensionSession::get_state() previously returned "model": null because the
session state JSON was hardcoded to null for the model field. Extensions that
inspect session state (e.g. to display the active model or conditionally
adjust behavior based on the provider) received no model information.

Now get_state() reads session.header.provider and session.header.model_id,
zipping them into a {"provider": "...", "id": "..."} object when both are
present. When either is missing (e.g. before the first prompt), null is
still returned to maintain backwards compatibility.

Existing test updated to verify the new model fields in session state output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
